name: All Aboard! Scotland's Poshest Train
overview: From picturesque scenery and rich history to sumptuous spa rooms and culinary artistry, Alan Cumming revels in the Royal Scotsman's splendour on an opulent odyssey through the heart of Scotland.

trailers.title: Exploring a Sacred Scottish Island On The Final Leg | All Aboard! Scotland's Poshest Train
